description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test package that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow has two jobs: prepare and test. The prepare job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, and uses the create-matrix-action to generate a matrix of Python, Django, and database versions. The test job runs on ubuntu-latest, uses the matrix from the prepare job, sets up a PostgreSQL service, checks out the code, installs prerequisites, sets up Python, upgrades pip, installs Django and requirements, runs tests with coverage, and uploads coverage to Codecov.
